steps.title: Locate color Y frequency in the table
steps.content: Reading the frequency table, color Y has a frequency of 6.

steps.title: Apply the probability formula
steps.content:
The probability of selecting color Y is:
$$P(\text{color Y}) = \frac{\text{frequency of color Y}}{\text{total number of flowers}} = \frac{6}{181}$$
This matches choice A — A is correct.
